documentation:
## Aliyun ROS NLPAUTOML Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as NLPAUTOML from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-nlpautoml';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.Dataset

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.Dataset.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.Dataset.attr_dataset_id
documentation: Attribute DatasetId: The dataset ID.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::NLPAUTOML::Dataset`, which is used to create a dataset.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDataset\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-nlpautoml-dataset>

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.DatasetProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Dataset`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-nlpautoml-dataset>

```
param dataset_name

Property datasetName: The name of dataset. Cannot start with numbers and symbols, and the length cannot be greater than 32 characters.

param project_id

Property projectId: The ID of project. To create a dataset under a certain project, fill in the target project ID.

param dataset_record

Property datasetRecord: Upload labeled data to the dataset.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.DatasetProps.dataset_name
documentation:
Property datasetName: The name of dataset.

Cannot start with numbers and symbols, and the length cannot be greater than 32 characters.

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.DatasetProps.project_id
documentation:
Property projectId: The ID of project.

To create a dataset under a certain project, fill in the target project ID.

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.DatasetProps.dataset_record
documentation: Property datasetRecord: Upload labeled data to the dataset.

classes.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.Model

documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.Model.attr_model_id
documentation: Attribute ModelId: The ID of model.

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.Model.attr_model_version
documentation: Attribute ModelVersion: The version of model.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::NLPAUTOML::Model`, which is used to create a model.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosModel\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-nlpautoml-model>

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.ModelProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Model`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-nlpautoml-model>

```
param dataset_id_list

Property datasetIdList: The uploaded dataset must be under the same project, and the total number of marked data is greater than or equal to 4.

param model_name

Property modelName: The name of model.

param model_type

Property modelType: The type of model. Please refer to the documentation for the parameter values corresponding to different types of models. Using the specified model type under different project, and the backend will do the verification. If the model type does not exist under the project, it will prompt that the base model is not found

param project_id

Property projectId: The project id to which the model belongs.

param lr

Property lr: Learning rate.

param nepochs

Property nepochs: Number of training dataset iterations.

param test_dataset_id_list

Property testDatasetIdList: Test set ID list. Some models under text classification support adding test set data.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.ModelProps.dataset_id_list
documentation: Property datasetIdList: The uploaded dataset must be under the same project, and the total number of marked data is greater than or equal to 4.

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.ModelProps.model_name
documentation: Property modelName: The name of model.

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.ModelProps.model_type
documentation:
Property modelType: The type of model.

Please refer to the documentation for the parameter values corresponding to different types of models.
Using the specified model type under different project, and the backend will do the verification. If the model type does not exist under the project, it will prompt that the base model is not found

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.ModelProps.project_id
documentation: Property projectId: The project id to which the model belongs.

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.ModelProps.lr
documentation: Property lr: Learning rate.

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.ModelProps.nepochs
documentation: Property nepochs: Number of training dataset iterations.

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.ModelProps.test_dataset_id_list
documentation:
Property testDatasetIdList: Test set ID list.

Some models under text classification support adding test set data.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.Project.attr_project_id
documentation: Attribute ProjectId: The project ID.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::NLPAUTOML::Project`, which is used to create a project.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosProject\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-nlpautoml-project>

methods.name: ros_cdk_nlpautoml.ProjectProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Project`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-nlpautoml-project>

```
param project_description

Property projectDescription: The description of project.Cannot start with numbers and symbols, and the length cannot be greater than 256 characters.

param project_name

Property projectName: The name of project. Cannot start with numbers and symbols, and the length cannot be greater than 32 characters.

param project_type

Property projectType: The type of nlp project. The following value is allowed: ner, textCategorybaseRelation, textMatching, sentimentAnalysis, resumeExtract, reviewAnalysis
```
